g.text: Determine the native resolution of upscaled material.
Analyzes a range of dimensions to find which one produces the lowest error when inverse scaled.
Primary use case is finding the native resolution of upscaled anime.
Path to the source material to analyze. Supports videos, images, or
VapourSynth scripts. For scripts, the first output is used.
The inclusive range of resolutions to test.
The increment step between resolutions in the tested range.
Specifies whether to analyze based on the
The kernel(s) to use for inverse scaling.
Can be a kernel name or a class call with
The specific frame number to extract and
analyze from video inputs. Ignored for images.
Crop the input frame before analysis to remove
The mathematical metric used to compare
The VapourSynth indexer used to load files.
Specifying the plugin namespace is also
